An incredibly massive, absolutely unprecedented, and historically defining electoral earthquake violently shook the European Union. ## SECTION 2 — Technology, Science & Space
The massive, highly lucrative world of global e-commerce officially absorbed the absolute, terrifying reality of the dot-com crash. With venture capital aggressively and permanently frozen, massive internet incubators and B2B platforms began heavy, massive waves of catastrophic layoffs. Tech startups with zero profitability, suddenly unable to secure further rounds of incredibly cheap capital, abruptly and aggressively filed for bankruptcy. This massive, brutal reality check completely shattered the illusion of the "New Economy," heavily proving that the fundamental laws of cash flow and corporate earnings had not been repealed by the internet.

The global financial markets operated in a state of absolute, massive tension. The Indian domestic economy faced a massive, highly coordinated threat from organized labor. An absolutely massive, incredibly volatile, and historically devastating geopolitical earthquake aggressively exploded in Jerusalem. In Andhra Pradesh, the rapid urbanization of the capital deeply exacerbated the state's ongoing agrarian crisis. With rural districts recovering from severe drought conditions, farmers organized highly aggressive protests against the state's decision to hike agricultural power tariffs.
